void.string: <process description="templateId=route-conditional-parallel-template&lbpmTmpId=route-conditional-parallel-lbpm" fdId="route-conditional-parallel-process"> <nodes> <startNode id="PX10" name="Start"/> <splitNode id="PX20" name="Conditional fan-out" splitType="condition" relatedNodeIds="PX50"/> <reviewNode id="PX31" name="Alpha review" handlerIds="alpha-reviewer" handlerNames="Alpha Reviewer" handlerSelectType="org"/> <reviewNode id="PX32" name="Gamma review" handlerIds="gamma-reviewer" handlerNames="Gamma Reviewer" handlerSelectType="org"/> <joinNode id="PX50" name="Conditional join" joinType="all" relatedNodeIds="PX20"/> <reviewNode id="PX60" name="Submitter confirmation" handlerIds="dynamic-submitter-placeholder-77" handlerNames="<提交人>" handlerSelectType="org"/> <reviewNode id="PX70" name="Department confirmation" handlerIds="ordinary-department-88" handlerNames="提交人部门" handlerSelectType="org"/> <endNode id="PX90" name="End"/> </nodes> <lines> <line id="PE10" startNodeId="PX10" endNodeId="PX20"/> <line id="PE21" startNodeId="PX20" endNodeId="PX31" condition="$fd_route_choice$.equals("A") || $fd_route_choice$.equals("B")" disCondition="$Route choice$ is Alpha or Beta"/> <line id="PE22" startNodeId="PX20" endNodeId="PX32" condition="$fd_route_choice$.equals("C")" disCondition="$Route choice$ is Gamma"/> <line id="PE31" startNodeId="PX31" endNodeId="PX50"/> <line id="PE32" startNodeId="PX32" endNodeId="PX50"/> <line id="PE50" startNodeId="PX50" endNodeId="PX60"/> <line id="PE60" startNodeId="PX60" endNodeId="PX70"/> <line id="PE70" startNodeId="PX70" endNodeId="PX90"/> </lines> </process>
